customer_issue:
Customer is unable to verify documents during the seller onboarding process on Walmart.
Customer has been waiting for 1 month for document verification during seller onboarding and requests escalation.
The issue is related to the US marketplace, and the customer is a high GMV seller.
summary: Customer is a high GMV seller facing a 1-month document verification delay for US marketplace onboarding.
suggested_response: Thank you for sharing these details. We have updated your case to reflect your high GMV seller status and US marketplace onboarding. This will help prioritize your escalation further.
